priorities.name: OFFICER EMERGENCY
priorities.definition: Officer needs help or emergency traffic declaring unit/officer in immediate danger. Highest channel priority. All non-emergency traffic yields.

priorities.name: IN PROGRESS LIFE/WEAPON
priorities.definition: Crime in progress with weapon, violence, or imminent harm to persons. Immediate closest appropriate multi-unit response with safety aired.

priorities.name: IN PROGRESS / URGENT
priorities.definition: In progress or just occurred elevated threat without confirmed weapons/life-imminent, or urgent public-safety need (open 911 with distress cues, injury crash).

priorities.name: PROMPT
priorities.definition: Prompt response: recent events, disturbances without active violence, welfare with time pressure, alarms.

priorities.name: ROUTINE
priorities.definition: Routine reports and cold events. Yields to all higher priorities. Stacking allowed with reason.

priorities.name: ADMIN / INFO
priorities.definition: Administrative, BOLO relay without response, internal info. No field unit unless exception noted.

reclass.upgrade: Immediate on new knowable cue; append CAD note; if units DIS/ER/OS re-tone radio or FAIL_RECLASS_NO_RADIO
reclass.downgrade: Requires reason; soft SOFT_DOWNGRADE_WHILE_ROLLING if units rolling; hard FAIL_PRIORITY_UNDERCODE if weapons flag still true
reclass.infoset_fairness: No undercode hard fail if weapons/IP never entered knowable set
